narrative:
Trenton 1 (precinct in Butler County) has 288 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
